subcodes.first_line: O spiritual glory, how glorious art thou! Among the conditions of glory is that one should offer one's breast to the darts of tribulation and calamity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شکوه روحانی چه شکوه نماای از شرایط شکوه اینست که تیر صدمه و بلا را سینه
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Imam Husayn, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
